jsonLd.title: Croma is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Croma. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Croma:
Croma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma!
